SEARCH

Uses of Package
cpdt.simulator.engine

Packages that use cpdt.simulator.engine
Package
Description
cpdt.simulator.engine
Provides the core simulation engine responsible for executing the chemical plant simulation.
cpdt.simulator.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for publishing simulated telemetry to external systems and vice versa.
  • Classes in cpdt.simulator.engine used by cpdt.simulator.engine
    Class
    Description
    ScenarioEngine
    Manages the lifecycle and execution of all active simulation scenarios.
    TelemetryPublisher
    Defines the contract for publishing telemetry packets generated by the simulator.
  • Classes in cpdt.simulator.engine used by cpdt.simulator.mqtt
    Class
    Description
    SimulatorEngine
    Coordinates the execution of the chemical plant simulation.
    TelemetryPublisher
    Defines the contract for publishing telemetry packets generated by the simulator.
